items.description:
HireForce | 
Corporate Finance Executive | Leading Irish PLC


HireForce is proud to partner with one of Ireland’s most prominent PLCs to recruit a Corporate Finance Executive for their high-performing Group Corporate Development team. This isn't just a "finance role"—it is a front-row seat to the Group’s global acquisition and corporate development strategy.


You will work directly with senior Group and divisional leadership, acting as a key driver in the deals that shape the company’s future.
